title: Race Eve Sharpener
description: Final activation the day before racing

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 15:54 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 70% for 15:54. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 70% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 0% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First interval at 130%. Set the tone. Your body remembers the last time you quit early.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First interval: 54s at 130-130% FTP. Seated. Focus on pacing, not heroics.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 1/3. You're starting fresh. Set the standard for the rest of the workout.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/3. Your legs feel good. Enjoy it. By rep 3 they'll be filing a formal complaint.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Starting. 130% for 54s. Controlled aggression. Lock in form early.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 53% done. Patience builds power, not suffering. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 4:48 at 70%. This should feel easy. If breathing hard, you're going too hard.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 53% complete. Your future self will thank you for these miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 53% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 53% done. Keep it comfortable. Nose breathing. Enjoy the ride.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 3/3. Everything you have left. Leave nothing for the cooldown.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 54s at 130%. Then 9min cooldown. Empty the tank correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last one. Everything you have. Then you're done and you'll be stronger for it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Same power as last time, but you're way more tired. Progressive overload! *cries in watts*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 130% × 54s. Then 9min cooldown. Leave nothing.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 71% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 71% complete. Rep 1/1. 60% at 85-100 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 71% through. This is your workout. Own it. 60% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 71% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 60% FTP × 9:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
